entry.title: Quick links🔗
entry.content:
All of the following links are for personal use. These links may be inaccessible. The copyright information can be found in the GitHub repository."

Gemini Pro Chat

start a free chat with Gemini-pro.
girhub repository

Chat with CUHKSZ

an agent with multiple CUHKSZ campus systems connected.
girhub repository

The Reader

a document reader powered by Gemini AI.
girhub repository

Open Webui

an edge-based large model playground.
girhub repository

entry.title: Introduction👋
entry.content:
Hi, I'm YF 👋
Welcome to my personal page! I'm a passionate and curious Computer Science and Engineering undergraduate student at CUHK-SZ with a strong interest in OR, machine learning and agents. I love tackling complex problems and building solutions that make an impact💡.

Feel free to check out my repositories and projects! 😄
